# Chapter 15: Optimisation  (~110 pp)
- 15.1 What an optimisation problem is (10)
- 15.2 Convex optimisation (18)
- 15.3 Linear and quadratic programming (15)
- 15.4 Lagrangian duality (15)
- 15.5 Gradient methods, Newton's method (15)
- 15.6 Stochastic optimisation, SGD (12)
- 15.7 Integer and combinatorial optimisation preview (15)
- 15.8 Failure section: local minima, ill-posed objectives, optimisation theatre (10)

**Archetype**: optimisation (formalised), scaling. **Project**: implement gradient descent from scratch; compare to a library. **Exercises**: 40.
